entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Different التعلم jobs need different interaction shapes، so inspir uses active، mode-specific teaching. A الواجبات تلميح، Socratic سؤال، historical simulation، بطاقة تعليمية مراجعة، و الكتابة critique ينبغي ليس behave like the same generic chat.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir began في 2013 as a عام اختبار و التعلم community، grew through المدارس و الطالب networks، و later developed تعلم AI infrastructure و عام مدرب AIing experiences.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: inspir exists إلى make التعلم accessible، engaging، enjoyable، و useful لـ anyone مع curiosity through مجاني عام تعلم AI tools و school-ready التعلم spaces.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity, whether they are a student, parent, teacher, or self-taught learner.
entries.value: inspir exists إلى make التعلم accessible، engaging، enjoyable، و useful لـ anyone مع curiosity، whether they are a الطالب، parent، المعلم، أو self-taught learner.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir is a مجاني تعلم AI platform مع عام وضع الضيفs لـ explanations، مدرب سقراطيing، الواجبات coaching، اختبارات، بطاقات تعليمية، نقاش، تمثيل أدوار، الكتابة تغذية راجعة، و الدراسة planning.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir is a مجاني تعلم AI platform مع عام وضع الضيفs لـ explanations، مدرب سقراطيing، الواجبات coaching، اختبارات، بطاقات تعليمية، نقاش، الكتابة تغذية راجعة، البرمجة مساعدة، و الدراسة planning.

entries.source: inspir is designed around reasoning, practice, recall, and explanation instead of handing learners finished work.
entries.value: inspir is designed around reasoning، تدرّب، recall، و explanation instead of handing learners finished work.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: inspir is organized around تلميحات، أسئلة، اختبارات، بطاقات تعليمية، نقاش، مراجعة، و explanation instead of passive answer-copying.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: inspir is organized around التعلم أوضاع such as مدرب سقراطيing، الواجبات تلميحات، اختبارات، بطاقات تعليمية، maths خطوات، الكتابة critique، و امتحان planning، so الطلاب land في a more مركز التعلم behavior.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes open at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir makes التعلم أوضاع افتح at /chat/{topicSlug}، letting learners land مباشرة inside the right تعلم AI experience من دون needing a saved خاص chat.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around learning modes with specific teaching behavior: explanations, Socratic questions, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir organizes AI around التعلم أوضاع مع محدد teaching behavior: explanations، Socratic أسئلة، الواجبات تلميحات، اختبارات، بطاقات تعليمية، نقاش، تمثيل أدوار، الكتابة تغذية راجعة، و الدراسة planning.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.

entries.value: المدارس و partners

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: المدارس و partners يمكن ابنِ من the عام product toward tailored، confidential، و subsidized deployments.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: المدارس يمكن evaluate inspir through عام وضع الضيفs first، ثم explore tailored تعلم AI spaces مع custom مسارات عمل، confidentiality planning، curriculum needs، و funded إتاحة paths.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: المدارس يمكن evaluate عام أوضاع first، ثم discuss tailored مسارات عمل، confidentiality planning، المحتوى needs، و funded إتاحة.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: المدارس يمكن test عام وضع الضيفs first، ثم استخدام the المدارس صفحة إلى explore tailored مسارات عمل، confidentiality planning، NCERT-aligned options، و funded إتاحة.

entries.source: Search and directory access
entries.value: Search و directory إتاحة

entries.source: See every mode
entries.value: See every وضع

entries.source: Short description
entries.value: نص تعلّمي: Short description

entries.source: Start directly in the right learning mode for homework hints, maths steps, writing critique, quizzes, flashcards, or exam planning.
entries.value: ابدأ مباشرة في the right التعلم وضع لـ الواجبات تلميحات، maths خطوات، الكتابة critique، اختبارات، بطاقات تعليمية، أو امتحان planning.

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: ابدأ التعلم

entries.source: Start with the public learning companion.
entries.value: ابدأ مع the عام التعلم companion.

entries.source: Started as public quizzes and student communities in 2013.
entries.value: Started as عام اختبارات و الطالب communities في 2013.

entries.source: Structured catalog of public pages, modes, learning paths, blog clusters, and privacy boundaries.
entries.value: Structured catalog of الصفحات العامة، أوضاع، مسارات التعلم، مدونة clusters، و الخصوصية boundaries.

entries.source: Students
entries.value: الطلاب

entries.source: Study with AI well
entries.value: الدراسة مع AI well

entries.source: Study workflows that connect guest modes, prompts, practice, and related guides.
entries.value: الدراسة مسارات عمل that connect وضع الضيفs، مطالبات، تدرّب، و ذات صلة أدلة.

entries.source: Support funded AI learning access for communities that need high-quality support without adding cost to families.
entries.value: Support funded تعلم AI إتاحة لـ communities that need high-quality support من دون adding cost إلى families.

entries.source: Syndicated coverage for wider consumer reach.
entries.value: Syndicated coverage لـ wider consumer reach.

entries.source: Teachers
entries.value: المعلمون

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: المعلمون و leaders يمكن ابدأ مع تعلم أي شيء، التعليم السقراطي، مدرب الواجبات، اختبارات، و بطاقات تعليمية قبل a formal rollout.

entries.source: Terms
entries.value: الشروط

entries.source: Text-first reference file for assistants, educators, partners, and citation tools.
entries.value: Text-first reference file لـ assistants، educators، partners، و citation tools.

entries.source: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, and planning.
entries.value: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning، الواجبات تلميحات، اختبارات، بطاقات تعليمية، تمثيل أدوار، و planning.

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: The community expanded through المدارس، universities، competitions، extracurricular programmes، و learner communities.

entries.source: The formal privacy page for data use, rights, and public service conditions.
entries.value: The formal الخصوصية صفحة لـ البيانات استخدام، rights، و عام الخدمة conditions.

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.
entries.value: The formal الشروط covering acceptable استخدام، حساب responsibilities، و الخدمة conditions.

entries.source: The goal is not to make people passive in front of AI. The goal is to give every learner a patient first place to ask, practise, get feedback, try again, and build confidence.
entries.value: The goal is ليس إلى make people passive في front of AI. The goal is إلى give every learner a patient first place إلى اسأل، practise، get تغذية راجعة، جرّب again، و ابنِ confidence.

entries.source: The goal is to help people find the right public learning page quickly. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open; API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay closed.
entries.value: The goal is إلى مساعدة people find the right عام التعلم صفحة quickly. عام مسارات، أدلة، و التعلم hubs are افتح; API، admin، reset، و خاص utility مسارات stay closed.

entries.source: The live access rules for public and private routes.
entries.value: The مباشرة إتاحة rules لـ عام و خاص مسارات.

entries.source: The live learning experience that turns the mission into practical help.
entries.value: The مباشرة التعلم experience that turns the mission into عملي مساعدة.

entries.source: The mission is connected to real product surfaces.
entries.value: The mission is connected إلى real product surfaces.

entries.source: The next phase is open-source, contributor-friendly, and connected to the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.
entries.value: The next phase is open-source، contributor-friendly، و connected إلى the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: The open-source rebuild لـ developers، educators، و contributors.

entries.source: The platform is designed to help people reason, practise, remember, and explain ideas back instead of collecting finished answers.
entries.value: The platform is designed إلى مساعدة people reason، practise، remember، و اشرح ideas back instead of collecting finished الإجابات.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: The platform worked على curriculum ingestion، retrieval، structured التعلم flows، و early مدرب AIing experiences.

entries.source: The product should teach, not just answer.
entries.value: The product ينبغي teach، ليس فقط الإجابة.

entries.source: The public blog contains more than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters connected to live learning modes.
entries.value: The عام مدونة contains more than 100 أدلة، مطالبة loops، و pillar clusters connected إلى مباشرة التعلم أوضاع.

entries.source: The public explanation of why inspir exists and why learning access matters.
entries.value: The عام explanation of why inspir exists و why التعلم إتاحة matters.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: The عام أوضاع are designed around التعلم behavior: تلميحات، Socratic أسئلة، step checks، اختبارات، بطاقات تعليمية، الكتابة تغذية راجعة، مراجعة loops، و active explanation.

entries.source: The public product gives anyone a place to start while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: The عام product gives anyone a place إلى ابدأ بينما school و partner deployments يمكن adapt the experience لـ local needs.

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: The عام product is easy إلى جرّب first، بينما المدارس و partners يمكن explore tailored deployments لـ community needs.

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: The عام product keeps التعلم easy إلى جرّب، بينما المدارس و CSR partners يمكن support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality، curriculum alignment، أو funded إتاحة.

entries.source: The public product stays easy to try: learners can land directly on a learning mode and begin as a guest. Schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or subsidised access.
entries.value: The عام product stays easy إلى جرّب: learners يمكن land مباشرة على a التعلم وضع و begin as a ضيف. المدارس و CSR partners يمكن support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality، curriculum alignment، أو subsidised إتاحة.

entries.source: The public product, the school pathway, and the content library should all point back to the same principle: learning should stay active, accessible, and useful.
entries.value: The عام product، the school pathway، و the المحتوى مكتبة ينبغي all point back إلى the same principle: التعلم ينبغي stay active، accessible، و useful.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: The عام statement of why inspir exists و what التعلم إتاحة means.

entries.source: The school pathway for tailored AI learning spaces and funded access.
entries.value: The school pathway لـ tailored تعلم AI spaces و funded إتاحة.

entries.source: The story from quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: The story من اختبارات و الطالب communities إلى مجاني تعلم AI tools built في عام.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: The story spans اختبارات، offline school networks، curriculum ingestion، و عام تعلم AI أوضاع.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: The strongest angle is مجاني عام تعلم AI that opens مباشرة في وضع الضيف و keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic الإجابة generation.

entries.source: The wider international buildout connected to the inspir project.
entries.value: The wider international buildout connected إلى the inspir مشروع.

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and deeper practice.
entries.value: The written التعلم مكتبة that supports مطالبات، حلقة دراسةs، و deeper تدرّب.

entries.source: Trust and privacy boundaries
entries.value: Trust و الخصوصية boundaries

entries.source: Trust and safety
entries.value: Trust و safety

entries.source: Try public guest modes
entries.value: جرّب عام وضع الضيفs

entries.source: Understanding over answers
entries.value: الفهم over الإجابات

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Unlike a generic chatbot، inspir organizes AI around التعلم أوضاع so learners يمكن ابدأ مع the kind of مساعدة they need: تلميحات، أسئلة، اختبارات، الاستدعاء النشط، تمثيل أدوار، نقاش، أو تغذية راجعة.

entries.source: Use https://inspirlearning.com for the site, /mission for the mission, /topics for the public learning mode directory, and /chat/learn-anything for the default guest learning experience.
entries.value: استخدم https://inspirlearning.com لـ the site، /mission لـ the mission، /موضوعات لـ the عام التعلم وضع directory، و /chat/learn-anything لـ the default ضيف التعلم experience.

entries.source: Use this for school, partner, CSR, and education access references.
entries.value: استخدم this لـ school، partner، CSR، و education إتاحة references.

entries.source: Use this when citing the long-form guide library, study prompts, and mode-specific articles.
entries.value: استخدم this when citing the long-form دليل مكتبة، الدراسة مطالبات، و mode-specific مقالات.

entries.source: Use this when describing the full set of guest-mode learning tools people can try immediately.
entries.value: استخدم this when describing the full set of guest-mode التعلم tools people يمكن جرّب immediately.

entries.source: Use this when introducing inspir as the main product or linking from a directory, profile, or article.
entries.value: استخدم this when introducing inspir as the main product أو linking من a directory، profile، أو مقال.

entries.source: Use this when linking readers straight into the live learning experience.
entries.value: استخدم this when linking readers straight into the مباشرة التعلم experience.

entries.source: Use this when referencing public/private boundaries, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: استخدم this when referencing عام/خاص boundaries، learner safety، و school trust.

entries.value: Who يمكن استخدام the media صفحة؟

entries.source: Why are public learning pages easy to share?
entries.value: لماذا are عام التعلم صفحات easy إلى share؟

entries.source: Why does inspir support school and partner deployments?
entries.value: لماذا does inspir support school و partner deployments؟

entries.source: Why is inspir built around modes instead of one chat box?
entries.value: لماذا is inspir built around أوضاع instead of one chat box؟

entries.source: Why now
entries.value: لماذا now؟

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Yes. A school يمكن begin by testing عام أوضاع، ثم move toward a pilot أو tailored deployment when the استخدام case، المحتوى needs، و funding path are واضح.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from simple /chat/{topicSlug} links.
entries.value: Yes. عام وضع الضيفs such as تعلم أي شيء، التعليم السقراطي، مدرب الواجبات، اختبارات، و بطاقات تعليمية افتح مباشرة من بسيط /chat/{topicSlug} links.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are open learning pages that anyone can try.
entries.value: Yes. عام موضوع entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything و /chat/socratic-instruction are افتح التعلم صفحات that anyone يمكن جرّب.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Yes. The عام وضع الضيفs let school leaders و المعلمون جرّب the التعلم experience قبل discussing a tailored school deployment.

entries.source: These pages make the story easier to verify, cite, share, and use: public modes, learning paths, long-form guides, school deployment notes, media facts, and the company background.
entries.value: تجعل هذه الصفحات القصة أسهل في التحقق منها والاستشهاد بها ومشاركتها واستخدامها: الأوضاع العامة، ومسارات التعلّم، والأدلة المطوّلة، وملاحظات نشر المدارس، وحقائق الإعلام، وخلفية الشركة.
